global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with a logo, main offer text, and a call to action.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A solid yellow background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring a circular icon next to the text 'BiteRush' in a bold font.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A circular icon that appears empty or outlined, positioned near the logo.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Your cravings, delivered' with a smaller price tag of '$4.98' below it.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered $4.98e Hable Get offer

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Get offer' in a contrasting color, encouraging user interaction.
